responsibilities: • maintain real -time books of accounts remotely   • handle bank, gst, and vendor reconciliations   • prepare monthly financial statements and dashboards   • support compliance and audit requirements   • manage accounting via cloud tools (zoho, quickbooks, xero)   • communicate with clients through digital channels
qualifications: • ca or experienced accounting professional   • expertise in cloud accounting tools   • strong remote client communication skills
